'''Montitia''' was a poverty-stricken [[Planet/Legends|planet]]<ref name="GATORW" /> in the [[Montitia system/Legends|Montitia system]] of the [[Montitian Grant sector/Legends|Montitian Grant sector]], located within the [[Expansion Region/Legends|Expansion Region]] of [[The galaxy/Legends|the galaxy]].<ref name="EAOC" /> The region of [[Realspace/Legends|space]] around Montitia was explored between [[1000 BBY/Legends|1000]] and [[25 BBY/Legends|25 BBY]],<ref name="TEA" /> and during the [[Extorin Minor skirmishes]], the world's populace was threatened by the [[Extorin]] aggressors and [[Montitian Extraction|evacuated]].<ref name="SWG8" /> Montitia was within unaligned space during the [[Clone Wars/Legends|Clone Wars]], and by the [[Imperial Era/Legends|Imperial Era]] the planet was inhabited again and was controlled by the [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Galactic Empire]]. Its [[Alien/Legends|alien]] residents were often recruited by the [[Corporate Sector Authority/Legends|Corporate Sector Authority]] to work on the [[Corporate Sector/Legends|Corporate Sector]] world of [[Duroon]], where they were kept in near-[[Slavery/Legends|slavery]].<ref name="TEA" /> The [[Human/Legends|Human]] [[Fringer/Legends|fringer]] [[Bash Fateau]] was born on Montitia.<ref name="GATORW" />
